name: Two-Party Exchange Liability Relief

eligibility.description: Requires both parties to be registered taxable fuel registrants under section 4101, a written contract, and specific terminal operator record-keeping treating the receiving person as the remover.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: In a qualified two-party exchange of taxable fuel between registered registrants, the delivering person is not liable for the fuel excise tax normally imposed under section 4081.
